name: Brazil Nut Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped brazil nuts (also known as Brazil nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the heavy cream thoroughly, and chill the bowl and beaters well.
2. Whip the chilled cream until stiff; do not over-beat.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the egg, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
4. If you want just the basic vanilla mousse for dessert, pour in the whipped cream and fold gently to combine. Freeze until firm.
5. For the Brazil Nut Mousse: add the chopped brazil nuts to the mousse mixture, then fold gently to combine. Pour into sherbet glasses or serving dishes.
6. Garnish with whole brazil nuts and candied cherries.
7. Serve chilled.
Note: This recipe is versatile; feel free to experiment with different additions and ingredients for your own unique flavor combinations. It's perfect for enjoying on a hot summer day.
